title: Hardys Heavy Duty Small Plastic Tool Box - Multiple Compartment Toolbox Organiser with Removable Tote Tray - Tool Chest Storage Box, 7 Compartment Box for Fixings, Hand Tools (13")
features: 𝟏𝟐 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐓𝐎𝐎𝐋 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐀𝐆𝐄 - This 13" heavy-duty plastic tool case is a perfect solution for hand tool storage, and is an excellent nail and screw organiser. Including 7 compartments at the top, 4 in the tote tray and 1 large tray at the bottom.

𝐊𝐄𝐄𝐏𝐒 𝐓𝐎𝐎𝐋𝐒 𝐎𝐑𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐈𝐒𝐄𝐃 - The small tool box compartments are ideal for keeping screws, washers, and nuts separated, while a large compartment fits hand tools, like hammers, pliers and screwdrivers, making it an efficient tool box organiser.

𝐒𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐃𝐘 𝐎𝐑𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐈𝐒𝐄𝐑 𝐁𝐎𝐗 - Our tool organisers feature a robust plastic locking clasp to keep your tools secure during transit, and a fold-away carry handle, making this large tool box durable and easy to transport around the home or to the work van.

𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐊𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐏 𝐓𝐎𝐎𝐋𝐒 𝐁𝐎𝐗 - This tool organiser doubles as a tool cabinet with its 320mm x 150mm x 135mm dimensions, ensuring you have ample tool storage box space for all your tools. It's ideal for keeping your shed or workshop tidy and organised.

𝐖𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑 & 𝐂𝐎𝐑𝐑𝐎𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍-𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐓𝐎𝐎𝐋 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐀𝐆𝐄 𝐎𝐑𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐈𝐒𝐄𝐑 - Ideal for DIY and professional use, this screw storage organiser keeps tools secure during transit and its resistant design extends the lifespan of your tool chests and toolbox organiser.
description: 𝟏𝟐 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐓𝐎𝐎𝐋 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐀𝐆𝐄 - This 13" heavy-duty plastic tool case is a perfect solution for hand tool storage, and is an excellent nail and screw organiser. Including 7 compartments at the top, 4 in the tote tray and 1 large tray at the bottom.
